_meta.suite: TU-6L — Six-Level Menu: Default, Collapse, Expand, Search
_meta.description: Verifies the 6-level sidebar menu works correctly for new users and existing users. Covers default state, collapse-all, expand-all, and search filtering.

simulate-fresh-user-session.name: Simulate Fresh User Session (No Menu Preference)
simulate-fresh-user-session.description: TU-6L-001 setup: Clear the zorbit_menu_style localStorage key to simulate a user who has never set a menu preference. This is exactly the state of any new user on first login.

steps.text: TU-6L-001: Simulating fresh user session. Clearing menu style preference from localStorage to test default behavior.

steps.description: TU-6L-001: Remove menu style pref — simulates a brand-new user with no prior choice
TU-6L-001: Reload dashboard — app reads localStorage on mount, will now use default

steps.text: localStorage cleared. App reloaded. Now verifying 6-level menu appears as default.

verify-6level-default.name: Verify 6-Level Menu Is Default
verify-6level-default.description: TU-6L-001: New user should see 6-level menu without any manual toggle

steps.description: TU-6L-001: Open sidebar if not open
TU-6L-001: Pin sidebar
TU-6L-001: 6L sidebar has SUPPORT CENTER section — confirms 6-level menu is active
TU-6L-001: Edition/Business Line selector visible — unique to 6-level menu

steps.text: TU-6L-001 PASSED. New user sees 6-level menu by default. SUPPORT CENTER section and Edition selector both visible.

login-superadmin.name: Login as Superadmin for Collapse/Expand/Search tests

steps.description: Login for collapse/expand tests

test-collapse-all.name: TU-6L-002: Collapse All Button
test-collapse-all.description: Clicking ChevronsUp button in sidebar toolbar collapses all L1 sections and their children

steps.text: TU-6L-002: Testing Collapse All button in 6-level sidebar.

steps.description: TU-6L-002 PRE-CONDITION: Sidebar is expanded and SUPPORT CENTER is visible
TU-6L-002: Click Collapse All button (ChevronsUp icon in toolbar)
TU-6L-002 POST-CHECK: Collapse All button still present in toolbar
TU-6L-002 POST-CHECK: Expand All button present (toolbar intact)

steps.text: TU-6L-002 PASSED. Collapse All button works. All sub-sections collapsed.

test-expand-all.name: TU-6L-003: Expand All Button
test-expand-all.description: Clicking ChevronsDown button in sidebar toolbar expands all sections after collapse

steps.text: TU-6L-003: Testing Expand All button — expanding after collapse.

steps.description: TU-6L-003: Click Expand All button (ChevronsDown icon)
TU-6L-003: SUPPORT CENTER L1 section visible after expand
TU-6L-003: Identity section visible after expand
TU-6L-003: Authorization section visible after expand
TU-6L-003: Navigation section visible after expand

steps.text: TU-6L-003 PASSED. Expand All restores all sections. Identity, Authorization, Navigation all visible.

test-search-filter.name: TU-6L-004: Search Filters Menu Items
test-search-filter.description: Typing in the search box filters menu to matching items and highlights them

steps.text: TU-6L-004: Testing search filter in 6-level menu.

steps.description: TU-6L-004 PRE: Expand all before search test
TU-6L-004: Search input visible in sidebar toolbar
TU-6L-004: Type 'Roles' in search box
TU-6L-004: Roles item visible in filtered results
TU-6L-004: Search match is highlighted with mark element
TU-6L-004: Change search to Audit
TU-6L-004: Audit items visible in filtered results
TU-6L-004: Clear search to restore full menu
TU-6L-004: Full menu restored after clearing search

steps.text: TU-6L-004 PASSED. Search filters work correctly. Match highlighting present. Clear restores full menu.

6l-default-journey.name: TU-6L-001: 6-Level Menu Default for New User
6l-default-journey.description: Clear zorbit_menu_style from localStorage (simulates brand-new user session) then reload. Verify 6-level menu is shown by default — SUPPORT CENTER section and Edition selector both visible without any manual toggle.
6l-default-journey.case_summary: 6-level menu is default for new users

6l-collapse-journey.name: TU-6L-002: Collapse All in 6-Level Menu
6l-collapse-journey.description: Login as superadmin. Verify Collapse All button (ChevronsUp) in sidebar toolbar collapses all L1-L6 tree nodes. Evidence: screenshot before/after, sub-section items not visible after collapse.
6l-collapse-journey.case_summary: Collapse all button collapses all sidebar sections

6l-expand-journey.name: TU-6L-003: Expand All in 6-Level Menu
6l-expand-journey.description: After collapse, click Expand All (ChevronsDown). Verify Identity, Authorization, Navigation sections and their children are visible. Evidence: fullpage screenshot showing all major sections expanded.
6l-expand-journey.case_summary: Expand all button restores all collapsed sections

6l-search-journey.name: TU-6L-004: Search Filters in 6-Level Menu
6l-search-journey.description: Type in the sidebar search box and verify menu filters to matching items. Test 'Roles' and 'Audit' searches. Verify match highlighting. Verify clear restores full menu.
6l-search-journey.case_summary: Search box filters 6-level menu and highlights matches
